---
title: "Research"
---

### Work in Progress

I will upload first updates on my research here soon.

### Policy work

[Bridging the gap: What would it take to narrow the UK’s productivity disparities?](https://economy2030.resolutionfoundation.org/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/Bridging-the-gap.pdf){target="_blank"}, The Resolution Foundation, June 2022  (with P Brandily, M Distefano, H Donnat, H Overman and K Shah)
